items.name: kaggle-competitions-portfolio
items.description: This repository contains my end-to-end solutions for various Kaggle competitions, showcasing data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, model training, and performance evaluation using Python and machine learning frameworks.

items.name: Climate-ML
items.description: About A machine learning framework to correct the "aridity blindspot" by distinguishing drought from chronic aridity. It enables accurate spatio-temporal analysis and forecasting of water stress in Central Africa, offering a robust tool for risk management in vulnerable regions.

items.name: Gene-Expression-Based-Leukemia-Classification-Using-Feature-Selection-and-Machine-Learning
items.description: Gene expression–based leukemia classification framework using feature selection and machine learning. The project analyzes genomic data to distinguish ALL and AML leukemia types through dimensionality reduction, model comparison, and interpretable gene ranking for biomedical prediction tasks.

items.name: opifex
items.description: A unified scientific machine learning framework built on JAX/Flax NNX

items.name: Hallucination_Detection_Sytem
items.description: An automated Natural Language Processing framework designed to detect and classify hallucinations in AI-generated text by cross-referencing claims against authoritative sources using hybrid machine learning and semantic analysis.

items.name: Face_MeshApp
items.description: Aiming to build a face mesh system, you’re stepping into a mix of computer vision + machine learning + real-time processing. The good news: you don’t need to start from scratch—there are powerful frameworks that already do most of the heavy lifting

items.name: qml-fourier-dynamics
items.description: A high-performance quantum machine learning framework for PAC-learning quantum dynamics via Fourier feature extraction and Quantum Overlap Kernels (Barthe et al., 2025).

items.name: bare-metal-ml
items.description: A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.name: IoMT
items.description: Developed a hybrid machine learning framework for real-time anomaly detection and intelligent alert optimization in IoMT health monitoring systems. The system processes key vital signs (heart rate, SpO₂, blood pressure, temperature) to identify physiological anomalies and support timely clinical interventions in remote patient monitoring.

items.name: RARIF-Framework
items.description: AI-powered Road Accident Risk Prediction system using Machine Learning. Predicts low, medium, and high risk based on traffic and environmental data. Includes XGBoost model, evaluation metrics, and SHAP-based explainability for better insights.

items.name: XGBoost-Analytics-Pipeline-for-Post-Earnings-Drift-Detection
items.description: This project implements a data engineering and machine learning pipeline designed to detect post-earnings price anomalies by integrating free multi-source financial data. It uses an XGBoost regressor optimized via Optuna within a rigorous walk-forward framework to prevent data leakage and ensure realistic backtesting performance.

items.name: MLap
items.description: A framework 🛠️ which can capture information 📖 on both the development and operation stages in machine learning 🤖

items.name: MLFromCore
items.description: A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python — no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.

items.name: RLProject
items.description: RLProject is an Unreal Engine 5.5 project that explores the **Learning Agents** plugin-a machine learning framework for training AI characters using reinforcement learning (RL) and imitation learning (IL).

items.name: heart-disease-interpretability-shap
items.description: The research and implementation of an interpretable machine learning framework to predict heart disease using the UCI Heart Disease dataset.

items.name: APT_Manuscript_Script
items.description: A Machine Learning/Deep Learning framework for detecting Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) using CSE-CIC-IDS2018 & CIC-IDS2017 dataset. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and ensemble model evaluation in a Jupyter environment.

items.name: myopia-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for discovering chronobiological gene signatures in myopia

items.name: data-ethics-fairness
items.description: A data analysis project on toxic content detection using machine learning, focused on improving accuracy, fairness, and interpretability across different labeling frameworks.

items.name: Diabetes_Prediction_OML
items.description: Machine learning framework for diabetes prediction using clinical data. Includes preprocessing, feature engineering, and model comparison (LR, SVM, NN, ensembles). Evaluated with precision, recall, F1-score, and ROC-AUC to ensure reliable and interpretable decision support.

items.name: Live-Event-Intelligence-Commentary
items.description: 🚀Live, multi-source sports event intelligence platform engineered with distributed, low-latency architecture that delivers real-time AI-generated commentary, predictive analytics, and context-aware insights. It leverages advanced machine learning pipelines, natural language generation(NLG) and stream processing frameworks to provide dynamic play.

items.name: LEMONsc
items.description: Framework for  mass estimation of massive objects in astrophysical collision-driven systems using machine learning models

items.name: SynapseEngine
items.description: Julia based Machine Learning framework for developing innovative avenues in Meta-Learning and AGI.

items.name: Cross-Domain-ML-Project
items.description: Cross-domain machine learning framework for breast cancer histopathology and phishing website detection with explainability and robustness analysis.

items.name: sodium-ion-battery-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting sodium-ion battery electrode properties

items.name: dgbpy
items.description: dgbpy is a framework for research and deployment of machine learning models from seismic and well data.

items.name: NLP-Review-Authenticity-Analysis
items.description: An NLP-based framework to analyze and classify online product reviews as genuine or fake using machine learning techniques.

items.name: omnibrain-ai-system
items.description: OmniBrain AI System — A multi-modal AI framework that ingests knowledge from documents, PDFs, books, web content, videos, and structured data, and transforms it into adaptive intelligence using machine learning.

items.name: EDU-AI-ML-Final
items.description: An AI-powered framework for Machine Learning education developed at IMA, Bhubaneswar. It features automated syllabus generation, a virtual tutor, and Bloom’s Taxonomy-based evaluation. Built with Python and NLP to bridge mathematical theory with interactive assessment.
Research paper - "An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for  Binary Classification Using Real-World Data"

items.name: doML
items.description: A meta-prompting framework for machine learning

items.name: spatial-agri-production
items.description: Framework analítico basado en Machine Learning espacial y econometría para cuantificar la vulnerabilidad agrícola ante perturbaciones climáticas (el Niño) en Puno, Perú.

items.name: alpha-signal-discovery
items.description: Python framework for building, validating, and backtesting quantitative trading strategies with machine learning, featuring robust data analysis, realistic backtesting, and comprehensive risk analytics.

items.name: pyBIA
items.description: Machine learning-based classification framework for detecting spatially extended and diffuse emission in the high redshift universe, using multi-band broadband imaging.

items.name: intelligent-test-selection-ml
items.description: Machine Learning–based intelligent test selection framework for CI/CD pipelines. Uses commit history, test execution data, and ML models to predict and run only relevant tests to accelerate regression cycles.

items.name: flaky-test-prediction-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for detecting flaky tests and improving CI/CD pipeline reliability.

items.name: Astrogaurd
items.description: A machine learning framework for detecting Potentially Hazardous Asteroids (PHAs) — built for planetary defense.

items.name: superml-java
items.description: Modular machine learning  framework foreign java for ML model training

items.name: CsPbI3-PSC-ML-Optimisation
items.description: COMSOL and Machine Learning surrogate framework for CsPbI3 perovskite solar cell layer thickness optimisation — University of Southampton Individual Project 2026

items.name: loan-default-loss-prediction
items.description: A two-stage machine learning framework for loan default classification and loss severity prediction using Logistic Regression, Elastic Net, Ridge, PLS, Random Forest, and XGBoost.

items.name: Perceptron-Lab
items.description: An interactive, browser-based visualization of a single-layer perceptron learning decision boundaries in real time.  Built using vanilla JavaScript, this project demonstrates the fundamentals of binary classification and machine learning — without any frameworks.

items.name: ytopt
items.description: ytopt: machine-learning-based autotuning and hyperparameter optimization framework using Bayesian Optimization

items.name: forecast_error_hrrr
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting and analyzing numerical weather prediction (NWP) forecast errors using mesonet observations, with a focus on improving bias correction, uncertainty estimation, and operational forecasting performance.

items.name: dasf-core
items.description: Framework for computing Machine Learning algorithms in Python using Dask and RAPIDS AI.

items.name: Customer-Churn-Prediction-and-Machine-Learning-Model-Evaluation-System
items.description: Developed a customer churn prediction system using machine learning. Implemented multiple classification models including Logistic Regression, SVM, KNN, Random Forest, and Gradient Boosting. Evaluated models using accuracy and F1-score, and built a comparison framework to select the best-performing model for churn prediction.

items.name: Paddle-Serving-Framework-Real-Time-ML-Inference-and-Deployment
items.description: High-Performance Model Deployment with Full MLOps Pipeline is a comprehensive solution for deploying and serving machine learning models in production. With support for multiple protocols, scalable cloud and edge deployment, and integrated monitoring, it provides an end-to-end framework for high-performance inference and model management.

items.name: Fraud-Detection-in-Carbon-Markets
items.description: Comprehensive framework of Machine Learning and Blockchain to detect and prevent fraud in carbon credit market

items.name: California-Earthquake-Forecasting-and-Analysis
items.description: A physics-informed machine learning framework for earthquake forecasting in California (1995-2025). This project integrates statistical seismology (Gutenberg-Richter law, Omori's Law) with XGBoost to identify predictive precursors to major seismic events.

items.name: ARTIST
items.description: A differentiable ray tracer using the PyTorch machine-learning framework in Python.

items.name: Gaussian-Process-Boosting-
items.description: GPBoost is a machine learning framework that combines gradient boosting with Gaussian processes (GPs) or mixed effects models. The idea is to leverage the strengths of boosting (handling structured, tabular data, strong predictive power) together with Gaussian processes

items.name: Gaussian-Process-Boosting
items.description: GPBoost is a machine learning framework that combines gradient boosting with Gaussian processes (GPs) or mixed effects models. The idea is to leverage the strengths of boosting (handling structured, tabular data, strong predictive power) together with Gaussian processes

items.name: SCADI-Dataet
items.description: SCADI Dataset: Classification of self-care problems in children with physical disabilities using ICF-CY framework and machine learning.

items.description: Thid repo contains code of basic PyTorch , tool (framework) used to build and train machine learning and deep learning models.

items.description: Decoding Linear A with Artificial Intelligence:A  Comprehensive Machine Learning and NLP Framework

items.name: Bayesian-Black-Litterman-with-Machine-Learned-Views
items.description: Authored a research paper developing a methodology to integrate machine learning return forecasts into the Black-Litterman portfolio construction framework, with a full Python backtesting implementation across an 11-asset multi-asset universe (2010-2024).

items.name: NumCompute-A-High-Performance-Numpy-Toolkit-
items.description: A NumPy-based machine learning framework implementing core ML functionalities from scratch with a focus on vectorization, numerical stability, and modular design.

items.name: ML-Classify-Framework
items.description: Machine Learning-Based Data Classification and Grading Framework

items.name: An-Explainable-Hybrid-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Fake-Job-Posting-Detection
items.description: Built an Explainable AI system for fake job posting detection using TF-IDF text features and credibility metadata. Trained and compared Random Forest, SVM, XGBoost, LightGBM, and stacking ensemble models. Used SHAP for model interpretability and deployed a real-time Streamlit application for fraud detection.

items.name: Real-time-fraud-detection
items.description: A scalable, real-time fraud detection framework that integrates big data streaming, ensemble machine learning, behavioral analysis, and adaptive feedback to achieve high accuracy with low latency and reduced false positives.

items.description: High-Performance PHP Machine Learning Framework

items.description: Machine learning projects performed using Tensorflow framework.

items.description: Engineered a proactive security framework for critical infrastructure using network segmentation and machine learning-driven anomaly detection to preemptively isolate grid attacks and prevent outages.

items.description: Neural Decoding of Imagined Music: A Machine Learning Framework for EEG-Based Audio Feature Reconstruction

items.description: Machine learning framework on Unsupervised learning, Supervised learning and Classification using 3 different datasets.

items.name: matbench-discovery
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.description: Detection-paper artifact for "NeurInSpectre: A Three-Layer Mathematical Framework for Gradient Obfuscation Detection in Adversarial Machine Learning" (CCS '26 Cycle B). Entry point: README_DETECTION.md.

items.name: blast-ppv-prediction
items.description: This project develops a comprehensive Machine Learning framework for predicting Peak Particle Velocity (PPV) from controlled blasting operations in Indian coal mines. It extends the traditional CMRI empirical formula with modern ML models, SHAP explainability, multi-output prediction, and a real-time safety intelligence dashboard.

items.name: dolphins
items.description: Framework developed for building machine learning datasets from PAM recordings collected during seismic surveys for marine mammal environmental monitoring.

items.name: SwiftMLKit
items.description: A  scikit-learn-inspired machine learning framework for the Swift language

items.name: The-Real-Time-Financial-Stock-Dashboard
items.description: A comprehensive financial intelligence system that integrates a Random Forest machine learning pipeline with real-time data visualization. The engine features a custom backtesting framework that achieved a 0.66 precision score during the 2022 bear market stress test, demonstrating high reliability in volatile environments.

items.name: apax
items.description: A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.

items.name: privacy-preserving-cloud-ml-models-
items.description: Framework to mitigate the privacy risks inherent in centralized cloud-based machine learning. While cloud infrastructures provide the scalability and computational power necessary for training advanced models, the traditional practice of aggregating sensitive raw data on central servers creates significant vulnerabilities to data breaches.

items.name: Log-Classification-Hybrid-Framework
items.description: A hybrid log classification framework that combines regex heuristics, machine learning, and an LLM path for source-specific log analysis.

items.description: An exercise applying the SEMMA framework for data analysis and machine learning with RNA expression data from different types of cancer.

items.description: My portfolio showcases projects in data analysis and data science, with emphasis on statistical analysis, machine learning models, and applied analytics. I develop data-driven solutions using Python and analytical frameworks, focusing on reliability, interpretability, and real-world applicability across different domains.

items.name: ML4Monsoons
items.description: This framework integrates large-scale NMME data and multi-platform observations to advance seasonal monsoon forecasting. This framework is developed using super-ensemble machine learning models to downscale, bias-correct, and generalize global forecasts into high-resolution regional climate intelligence for precipitation and temperature

items.name: IDO1-inhibitors-ML-and-docking-data
items.description: A Reproducible Hierarchical Virtual Screening Framework Integrating Scaffold-Aware Machine Learning, Ensemble Docking, and Molecular Dynamics: Application to IDO1

It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing — powered by big data and machine learning.

items.name: Diabetes-Readmission-Prediction
items.description: A machine learning framework for predicting diabetic patient hospital readmission across three outcome classes. Covers 12 models from Logistic Regression to Stacking Classifiers, with SMOTE balancing, GridSearchCV tuning, LIME explainability, and feature importance analysis on 101,766 patient records.

items.description: A generalizable machine learning framework for biorefinery pretreatment design (LAM-Pre)

items.name: ml_in_c
items.description: A growing collection of bare-metal machine learning experiments. Building everything from single-weight optimizers to full C-based AI frameworks without external libraries

items.description: Developed a robust predictive framework to estimate Offensive Performance (Points Per Game - PPG) for the 2024-2025 NFL season. The project successfully transitioned from raw data ingestion (XLS/CSV) to a refined machine learning pipeline, achieving higher interpretability by mitigating multicollinearity and implementing advanced feature selection.

items.description: Machine Learning Ensemble Framework for Glioma Grading with Explainable AI

I build end-to-end solutions from data processing and modeling to API deployment, using Python, SQL, FastAPI, Docker, and modern web/mobile frameworks, with a focus on practical, real-world projects.

items.name: AI-Training-Specialist-Data-Annotator-Machine-Learning-Support
items.description: AI portfolio: dataset annotation, evaluation frameworks, Kaggle preprocessing, SEC EDGAR analysis, arXiv research summaries.

items.name: Adaptive-Spatial-Risk-Modeling-System-ASRMS-
items.description: **Adaptive Spatial Risk Modeling System (ASRMS)** is a hybrid AI framework that combines machine learning, historical probability, and user feedback to predict risk in grid-based environments. It uses TensorFlow.js for in-browser learning, supports real-time updates, and improves accuracy through correction-based adaptive training.

items.name: Intelligent-Image-Steganography-Framework
items.description: Adaptive Image Steganography Framework using Machine Learning for edge detection and secure data hiding.

items.name: minimd
items.description: A minimal molecular dynamics driver using machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) via the ASE framework.

items.name: simple-ml-backprop
items.description: A simple from-scratch implementation of backpropagation in Python, focusing on how gradients are computed and propagated through a computational graph. The implementation is then applied to train a basic multilayer perceptron (MLP) using gradient descent, without external machine learning frameworks.
